##RRUFFID=R190028
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Fe^3+^_3_(PO_4_)_2_(OH)_3_·3H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Rocabruna mines, Bruguers, Gavà, Baix Llobregat, Barcelona, Catalonia, Spain
##OWNER=Joan Rosell
##SOURCE=Joan Rosell, Jordi Ibáñez (CSIC-ITJA), Tariq Jawhari (CCiTUB)
##DESCRIPTION=White, fine-grained spherical aggregate
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R190028
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Fe^3+^_4.61_Al_0.45_)(P_0.97_V_0.03_O_4_)_4_(OH)_3_·4.8H_2_O ; EDS scan
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder, with some quartz
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 7.9501 b: 9.974 c: 7.634 alpha: 103.86 beta: 115.835 gamma: 67.855 volume: 502.57 crystal system: triclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
